         self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

+        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

+        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

         self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         

@@ -16,7 +17,7 @@
         x = self.dropout(x)

         h, _ = self.lstm(x)

         h = self.dropout(h)

-        logits = self.out(h) # [B, T, num_skills]

+        logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

 class DKT_Concat(nn.Module):

@@ -43,7 +45,8 @@
         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

         self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

+        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

+        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

@@ -63,7 +66,8 @@
         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

         self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

-        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

+        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

+        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

         self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         

@@ -83,7 +87,8 @@
         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

         self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

+        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

+        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

         self.out = nn.Sequential(

             nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim, hidden_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

@@ -119,37 +124,36 @@
         self.layer_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

         

         self.ffn = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim * 4),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),

-            nn.Dropout(dropout)

+            nn.Linear(embed_dim * 4, embed_dim)

         )

-        

-        self.out = nn.Linear(embed_dim, 1)

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        self.pred = nn.Linear(embed_dim, 1)

         

     def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):

         B, T = skill_ids.shape

         

         interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

+        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

         

-        interaction_embeds = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

-        query_embeds = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

+        positions = torch.arange(T, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)

+        pos_embeds = self.pos_emb(positions)

         

-        pos_interactions = torch.arange(T, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)

-        pos_queries = torch.arange(1, T+1, device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)

+        x = x + pos_embeds

+        x = self.dropout(x)

         

-        interaction_embeds = interaction_embeds + self.pos_emb(pos_interactions)

-        query_embeds = query_embeds + self.pos_emb(pos_queries)

+        query = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

         

         causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device), diagonal=1).bool()

         

-        attn_out, _ = self.attn(query_embeds, interaction_embeds, interaction_embeds, attn_mask=causal_mask)

-        attn_out = self.layer_norm1(attn_out + query_embeds)

+        attn_out, _ = self.attn(query, x, x, is_causal=True, attn_mask=causal_mask)

         

-        ffn_out = self.ffn(attn_out)

-        out = self.layer_norm2(ffn_out + attn_out)

+        out1 = self.layer_norm1(query + self.dropout(attn_out))

         

-        logits = self.out(out).squeeze(-1)

+        ffn_out = self.ffn(out1)

+        out2 = self.layer_norm2(out1 + self.dropout(ffn_out))

+        

+        logits = self.pred(out2).squeeze(-1)

         return logits

     elif model_type == 'DKT_SkillEmb':

     else:

         model = SAKT(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, dropout=dropout).to(device)
